signals.headline: Congress-UDF Seat-Sharing Deal Confirmed: Congress to Contest 95 Seats, IUML 27 Seats in Kerala Assembly Elections** | Y
signals.raw:
Congress-UDF Seat-Sharing Deal Confirmed: Congress to Contest 95 Seats, IUML 27 Seats in Kerala Assembly Elections** | YES | HIGH confidence[6]  

This agreement, reported in recent coverage, resolves IUML's aggressive push for 30 seats (from 25 in 2021) amid strong local body poll performance, settling at 27 as in 2021 per party leaders[2][5][6]. It stabilizes UDF alliance dynamics ahead of polls
